• RM doc

1. Warm-up (5 min)
  2. Uptime (30 min)
    • % of uptime has decreased from 99.7-99.8% to 99.3-99.4% recently. Seems like it keeps on going down. Let's brainstorm solutions that could guarantee keeping it above 99% for the rest of the year.
  3. AWS costs (20 min)
    • What else can we do to reduce the expenses?
  4. Cool down (5 min)

Hi everyone!
The purpose┬аis to debrief Nick and Kate call on a new opportunity.


itтАЩs important not to postpone it for 2 reasons:

  2. this is quite important topic which can potentially bring us a new opportunity

events.summary: [OS Hub] Bizdev: Backlog Refinement / Retro p.2
events.description:
Bizdev Kanban Board
Notes
Review the timeline.┬аAdjust the scope and priority of epics to meet the current needs.

Homework to do prior:
  • Update the status column on your individual activity boards in Monday
  • Review your team dashboards to reflect on what we achieved or did not achieve this quarter
    • Ops -┬аGoals Dashboard in Monday
    • BD -┬аGoals Dashboard in Monday
    • PDE & SE -┬аGoals Dashboard in Monday

Key Links
  • Mural Board we are working off today┬а(Left side of the Mural board today)

Agenda
  • 10 Minutes: All Team Warm up / Break Out - What Q1 activity that you achieved were you most proud of?
  • 15 Minutes: Team lead walks through Monday team dashboards. Lead conversation about what was accomplished and what was missed.
  • 40 Minutes: Teams answer retro questions on stickies in the OS Hub canvas and cluster where similarities exist
  • 20 Minutes: Discuss themes, determine open questions, determine next actions. Complete Top 5 Learnings/Next Actions

• RM doc
  • Internal RM doc

Bizdev Kanban Board
Notes

Agenda:
1.┬аReview+Demo+MiniPlanning (30min)

2. Finish Retro (25min)

events.summary: Q1 & Q2 Team Share Out (Remind Tyler to Record)
events.description:
Homework to do prior:
  • Review your teams retro and look forward work from the last two days via the Mural
  • Team Leads share highlights by filling out their teams slide on this quarterly share out Canva deck.┬а
    • The last slide is open challenges for discussion, each team has a column to share any items they want to discuss with the team.

Agenda
  • 5 Minutes: All Team Warm up -┬аWhats something new you learned through the mural sessions the past two days about OS Hub?
  • 40 Minutes:┬аTeams Leads share their slides answering the following 4 questions. Slides & Feedback from teams will be capped at 10 minutes each.
    • What we accomplished?
    • What was delayed/not accomplished?
    • Learnings/next actions from Retro
    • Priority Q2 Activities for your Team
  • 15 Minutes:┬аOpen Challenges for Discussion

Estimate user stories to be included in the next sprint.
